input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.6.5.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.6.5.3
            TITLE: tractive system and glv circuits must not run through the same conduit or connector, except

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.6.5.3: Tractive System and GLV circuits must not run through the same conduit or connector, except
EV.6.5.3 Tractive System and GLV circuits must not run through the same conduit or connector, except 
as allowed in EV.7.8.4

final_answer: Tractive System and GLV circuits must not run through the same conduit or connector, except as allowed in EV.7.8.4
